test_cases.name: test_plugin_must_implement_fetch
test_cases.description: Validates that BasePlugin subclass without fetch() raises TypeError

test_cases.name: test_plugin_must_implement_validate_config
test_cases.description: Validates that BasePlugin subclass without validate_config() raises TypeError

test_cases.name: test_plugin_fetch_returns_plugin_data_list
test_cases.description: Validates that properly implemented plugin returns List[PluginData]

test_cases.name: test_plugin_data_fields
test_cases.description: Validates all PluginData fields are present with correct types

test_cases.name: test_plugin_data_with_read_true
test_cases.description: Validates PluginData read field can be set to True

test_cases.name: test_plugin_data_immutable
test_cases.description: Validates PluginData is frozen (immutable)

test_cases.name: test_plugin_data_metadata_can_contain_any_type
test_cases.description: Validates metadata accepts dict[str, Any] with various types

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_validation_valid
test_cases.description: Validates PluginConfig creation with required fields and defaults

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Validates PluginConfig with all fields explicitly set

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_interval_boundary_valid
test_cases.description: Validates interval_minutes boundary values (1, 1440)

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_interval_boundary_invalid_zero
test_cases.description: Validates interval_minutes=0 raises ValidationError

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_interval_boundary_invalid_negative
test_cases.description: Validates interval_minutes=-1 raises ValidationError

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_interval_boundary_invalid_too_large
test_cases.description: Validates interval_minutes=1441 raises ValidationError

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_missing_required_field_name
test_cases.description: Validates missing 'name' field raises ValidationError

test_cases.name: test_plugin_config_missing_required_field_interval
test_cases.description: Validates missing 'interval_minutes' field raises ValidationError

test_cases.name: test_validation_result_structure_valid
test_cases.description: Validates ValidationResult structure for success case

test_cases.name: test_validation_result_structure_invalid
test_cases.description: Validates ValidationResult can represent errors

test_cases.name: test_validation_result_can_be_used_in_plugin
test_cases.description: Validates ValidationResult usage in plugin validate_config

test_cases.name: test_complete_plugin_workflow
test_cases.description: End-to-end test of plugin creation, config validation, and data fetching

test_cases.name: test_plugin_with_invalid_config_workflow
test_cases.description: Validates error handling in complete workflow with invalid config

changes: Added mypy type checking step (strict mode)

notes: TDD Red Phase: All tests are written and will be skipped until implementation exists
Tests use pytest.mark.skipif to gracefully handle missing implementation
GitHub Actions workflow will run on push/PR to main branch
Python 3.12.3 is available in the environment (compatible with 3.11+ requirement)
All 20 test cases cover happy path, edge cases, and error handling
Tests follow AAA pattern (Arrange, Act, Assert)
Comprehensive documentation provided in README.md and TEST_PLAN.md
